title: Categories
deleteConfirmEmpty: Permanently delete this category? This can't be undone.
deleteConfirmWithHabits: Permanently delete this category and its {n} habit(s) — along with all their logs, streaks, and rewards? This can't be undone.
archiveConfirm: Delete this category? It will be archived — your data is preserved and you can restore it later.
archiveConfirmWithHabits: Delete this category? Its {n} habit(s) will keep showing on your home checklist until you delete them — but the category disappears from this list. You can restore it later.

islamicVerse.arabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلتَّوَّٰبِينَ وَيُحِبُّ ٱلْمُتَطَهِّرِينَ
islamicVerse.translation: Indeed, Allah loves those who turn to Him in repentance, and He loves those who purify themselves.
